learningObjectives: Use Task Manager for first-pass troubleshooting

plainEnglishDefinitions.plain: The part of the computer doing the work right now.

analogies: Task Manager is the control room showing what the computer is busy doing.
handsOnTasks: Sort by CPU and end a safe test app
breakFixTasks: Open Task Manager with Ctrl+Shift+Esc when normal path fails
ticketIdeas: Why Is The Computer So Slow?
automationOpportunities: Manual diagnosis first, then monitoring or scripted cleanup
reviewQuestions: When should you not force close an app?
